title: fix: improve mobile modal and model layouts
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Pocket-sized perfection
gist.blurb: We've polished up the mobile experience for the API key and model pricing tables. Everything fits better, scrolls smoother, and looks sharper on your phone.
gist.summary: Improved the mobile layout for model pricing tables and fixed touch-scrolling issues in the API key dialogs on mobile Safari.
gist.impact: Mobile users will experience a cleaner layout for model capabilities and pricing, plus smooth scrolling when creating or editing API keys.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a mobile device, symbolizing the mobile UI improvements. A cozy, chunky pixel art smartphone displaying a clean interface.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, happily tapping on a glowing chunky smartphone screen. The phone displays a clean, organized list of code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, happily tapping on a glowing chunky smartphone screen. The phone displays a clean, organized list of code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
